languages.text: Wearer can pass through units, dealing {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} impact damage with 20% penetration to them. During Dash damage is direct instead.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента может проходить через позиции союзников и противников. Каждое существо на его пути получает {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударного урона{/g} с 20% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}. languages.text: El usuario puede moverse a través de aliados y enemigos por igual. Toda criatura que se interponga en su camino sufre {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} con un 20 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}. Mientras esté utilizando la {g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}Carrera{/g}, este {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} ignora la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g}.

languages.text: Der Nutzer kann sich durch Gegner und Verbündete bewegen. Jede Kreatur auf seinem Weg erleidet {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} mit 20 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}. Während des Einsatzes von {g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}Sprinten{/g} ignoriert dieser {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} jede {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, dostların ve düşmanların içinden ilerleyebilir. Yoluna çıkan her yaratık, %20 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarına{/g} maruz kalır. Bu {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g}, {g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}Atılım{/g} yaparken {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırhı{/g} yok sayar.

languages.text: L'utilisateur peut traverser alliés comme ennemis. Chaque créature sur sa trajectoire subit {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} avec 20 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}. Lors d'un {g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}Sprint{/g}, ces {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} ignorent l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g}.

Chaque créature sur sa trajectoire subit {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} avec 20 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}. languages.text: 使用者可穿过盟友和敌人移动。路径上的每个生物承受附带20%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659}点{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}。使用{g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}急速冲刺{/g}时，此{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}无视{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}。

Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} with 20% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. While using {g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}Dash{/g}, this {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} ignores {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 使用者可穿过盟友和敌人移动。路径上的每个生物承受附带20%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659}点{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}。使用{g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}急速冲刺{/g}时，此{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}无视{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}。

languages.text: 使用者は敵味方の間を通り抜けることができる。進路上にいる各ユニットは{uip|Damage|c1c53475a0234ba29d036f16b9a51659} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}の衝撃ダメージ{/g} を受け、20% の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g} を受ける。{g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}Dash{/g} を使用している間、この{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g} は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}アーマー{/g} を無視する。

While using {g|f:9b09708aa0c244a6bc4a8e46d69c5884}Dash{/g}, this {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} ignores {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}.
